name: luxcss
description: Attribute-first CSS & JS library. Style anything with one HTML attribute. Zero dependencies, no build step.
author: Abideen

scripts.build: echo 'No build step needed — dist/ is the source'
scripts.sync: cp dist/lux.css docs/lux.css && cp dist/lux.js docs/lux.js && cp dist/lux.d.ts docs/lux.d.ts && cp dist/index.html docs/index.html && cp dist/docs.html docs/docs.html
scripts.release: npm run sync && git add . && git commit -m 'sync docs with dist' && npm version patch && npm publish --access public && git push && git push --tags
